narrative:
Wilmington 3-C (precinct in Clinton County) has 627 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.3 percentage points.
